title: Differentiation approach in education: Tailoring instruction for diverse learner needs
author: Goyibova, Muslimov, et al.

steps.title: Method
steps.instruction: This study examined differentiation in education across diverse national contexts, exploring strategies like task complexity differentiation, flexible grouping, and multiple intelligences, supplemented by case studies in foreign language classrooms to observe teacher adaptations for individual needs.

steps.title: Method
steps.instruction: In this review, we searched two concepts of differentiation approach in education. They are differentiated learning and differentiation approach, and their comparisons in the primary class.
